_comment: Example answers for scripts/fill-template.sh — the illustrative 'Violin Tools' instance this seed was extracted from. Copy this to .seed/answers.json and replace every value with your own product's before filling. Optional placeholders (REVIEW_BOT, FIGMA_FILE_ID) may be left as empty strings to DISABLE their module; the fill script blanks them and warns. The _comment key is ignored by the script.
PROJECT_TAGLINE: a web app of focused practice tools for violinists
